name: Triple-Negative Breast Cancer
note: 42-year-old female with triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC), stage IV metastatic. PD-L1 CPS 15, BRCA1/2 germline wild-type. Previously treated with anthracycline and taxane-based regimen (AC-T). No prior immunotherapy. ECOG PS 0. Normal organ function: eGFR 95, ALT 28, bilirubin 0.6. Liver metastases confirmed on CT scan. Brain MRI negative.

expected_profile.diagnosis: triple-negative breast cancer, stage IV metastatic

notes: PD-L1 positive TNBC. Candidates: immunotherapy combinations, ADC trials, PARP inhibitor trials despite BRCA WT.
